content.en:
White Elephant City.

Ye Tian followed some Blood Transformation Realm people from the Vajra Snake Clan here.

After entering here, Ye Tian was really shocked by the number of Blood Transformation Realm creatures here.

There are a lot of creatures in the Blood Transformation Realm here, and they coexist peacefully, without any fighting.

Of course, this is not to say that these Blood Transformation Realm creatures are friendly, but the White Shadow Elephant Clan is too powerful, and the Blood Transformation Realm creatures who come here to trade do not dare to make trouble at all.

But once you leave White Elephant City and leave this area, fighting is very common.

If you don't have enough strength or background to show your treasures or financial resources in the White Elephant City, you are looking for death!

"Hey, there are cultivators!"

Ye Tian sensed some Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor level cultivators, but they should not be cultivators in the Ten Thousand Dragons Territorial Sea.

These cultivators actually came to the White Elephant City as well, and it was obvious that the White Elephant City allowed any race to enter here, and so did the cultivators.

Ye Tian didn't plan to trade this time, after all, his identity was a new Blood Transformation Realm Vajra Snake of the Vajra Snake Clan, and he didn't have any treasures, so he couldn't trade anything good.

He came here just to see what was going on in the White Elephant City.

Soon, the Vajra Snake Clan traded a lot of resources in the White Elephant City.

In the seams of territorial waters, each race needs different resources, and the resources that the Vajra snake clan does not need may be the resources that other races are extremely eager for.

And the resources that other races don't need, the Vajra snake clan may just need them.

It is precisely because of this that the transactions in the White Elephant City are so hot.

Of course.

Any transaction requires a certain share to be paid to the White Shadow Elephant Clan, and the share paid is not much, so these Blood Transformation Realm creatures will give it.

Moreover, it is only safe to trade in the White Elephant City.

If they were allowed to trade in the outside world, they would really not dare.

Time passes slowly.

Ye Tian had been in the White Elephant City for a long time, and he had also followed the other Vajra Snakes to see many powerful Blood Transformation Realm creatures.

this day.

The Vajra Snake Clan has acquired a lot of resources and is ready to return to the Vajra Snake Clan.

Since the Vajra Snake Clan was very powerful, there was no idea that the Blood Transformation Realm creature would dare to fight the Vajra Snake Clan, and the whole process was very smooth, and they did not encounter any attacks.

It was precisely because of this that the Vajra Snake Clan did not send powerful Blood Transformation Realm creatures.

This is racial deterrence!

A cultivator like Ye Tian, who was alone in the impact of the epidemic, was the most vulnerable target to be attacked by the creatures of the Blood Transformation Realm.

......

this day.

Ye Tian's true body copied his body and came to the side of White Elephant City, and after coming here, he found that the eyes of many Blood Transformation Realm creatures were focused on him.

Obviously, his cultivation in the Blood Transformation Realm was targeted.

Cultivators are almost all ascetics and have no power, and even if they are forces, they don't want to be so united.

As a result, practitioners are easily targeted.

The Territorial Sea Boundary Rift is the territory of the Blood Transformation Realm race, and cultivators are too excluded here, and only powerful cultivators dare to walk independently in the territorial sea boundary rift.

Like the cultivators Ye Tian had seen in the White Elephant City before, they were all above the Third Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor.

Once the Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor, I didn't see any of them.

Of course.

Ye Tian was not afraid of being targeted, he walked in the White Elephant City very indifferently.

Soon, he came to a shop in the White Elephant City, this shop was called the White Dragon Shop, which was opened by the White Dragon clan in the gap between the territorial waters.

At this time, a three-blooded Blood Transformation Realm white dragon in the store was lying there, and when he saw Ye Tian coming, he stretched out his head and looked over.

"Cultivator, what do you want to buy?"

The white dragon asked.

"Dragon Gold Blood!"

Dragon Gold Blood is not real blood, but a blood-like resource, born in the territory of the White Dragon Clan, and it is also one of the resources of this store.

Ye Tian knew that Dragon Gold Blood was one of the treasures that was very suitable for cultivators to refine their hearts, so he wanted to come over and buy some.

"Dragon gold blood, there are a lot, how much do you want? price, our store only accepts white elephant gold, one white elephant gold for one drop of dragon gold blood. Bailong said.

White Elephant Gold is the currency introduced by the White Elephant family, but White Elephant Gold itself has a high value, so it can be circulated.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian took out hundreds of White Elephant Gold, which was attacked by some Blood Transformation Realm creatures in the Impact Flow before, and some of them died in his hands, while those Blood Transformation Realm creatures had some White Elephant Gold on their bodies.

As a result, he now owns hundreds of white elephant gold.

"657 pieces of White Elephant Gold, you can buy 657 drops of Dragon Gold blood. "

After glancing at it, the white dragon said.

"Do you accept Golden Muscle Fluid here?" Ye Tian asked.

"The golden muscle fluid that the Vajra snake clan is abundant?" the white dragon became interested.

"Yes!" Ye Tian nodded.

Bai Long said: "The golden muscle fluid is not bad for building a foundation, and it is useful for many races, but a small amount of golden muscle fluid is useless. Moreover, the grade of the golden muscle fluid is relatively low, and a hundred drops of gold muscle fluid can be exchanged for a drop of dragon gold blood, what is it?"

"Yes!"

Ye Tian agreed.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian took out 100,000 drops of Golden Muscle Liquid, which really frightened the white dragon.

"Did you rob the Vajra Snake Clan?"

The white dragon couldn't help but say.

"I accidentally found a treasure place that breeds golden muscle fluid. Ye Tian explained.

Whether this white dragon phase believes it or not, it will not affect this transaction.

This white dragon didn't ask much, and soon made a deal with Ye Tian.

100,000 drops of Golden Muscle Fluid for 1,000 drops of Dragon Gold Blood, plus those 657 drops of Dragon Gold Blood, he obtained a total of 1,657 drops of Dragon Gold Blood.

Subsequently.

He went to the shop of the Blood Dragon Clan, and the Blood Dragon Clan also gave birth to Dragon Gold Blood, so their shop also sold Dragon Gold Blood.

Ye Tian took out a lot of golden muscle fluid again, and exchanged it for a lot of dragon gold blood.

In this way, Ye Tian exchanged a total of tens of thousands of drops of dragon gold blood in one shop after another.

"With so much dragon gold blood, it should allow me to break through my cultivation and reach the second blood transformation realm!"

Ye Tian said with a sigh.

He didn't leave White Elephant City, and if he left now, he would definitely be attacked.

Therefore, he rented a cave mansion and practiced in retreat in the White Elephant City.

"Try the effect of Dragon Gold Blood!"

Ye Tian swallowed a drop of dragon gold blood and began to refine it, the energy of dragon gold blood tempered his heart, making his heart slowly become stronger.

"Sure enough, it has an effect, and the speed of refining the heart is far faster than that of the golden muscle fluid!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.
